implemented_behavior: Added a lotus-core PortfolioCashflowProjection:v1 adapter that emits CASH_RESIDUAL realized source evidence from source-owned total_net_cashflow.

Preserves product identity, product version, portfolio id, as-of date, latest evidence timestamp, data-quality status, source fingerprint, projection range, include-projected posture, selected measure, and explicit portfolio currency.
Adds a bounded unavailable source helper for source-owner outage or unavailability states.
Rejects missing portfolio currency, missing total net cashflow, and missing include-projected posture instead of emitting unsupported ready evidence.
explicit_boundaries: No local projection-point aggregation in lotus-manage.
No liquidity ladder, MWR flow, tax, FX, execution, or rule outcome derivation from the cashflow projection.
No currency conversion or inferred currency units.

tests_run.result: passed: ruff, format, monetary-float, no-alias, mypy, OpenAPI, API vocabulary, domain-product, trust-telemetry, observability, and 935 unit tests

critical_review.completeness: Complete for the source-owned total net cashflow scalar now exposed by lotus-core PortfolioCashflowProjection:v1.
critical_review.correctness: The adapter consumes only explicit source-owned fields and blocks malformed or incomplete source contracts.
critical_review.testing_quality: Focused tests cover ready, degraded, unavailable, and malformed source behaviors plus realized snapshot assembly.
critical_review.clean_code: Implementation follows existing core source adapter structure and avoids new cross-module abstractions.
critical_review.remaining_boundaries: Broader cash movement totals, liquidity ladders, MWR flow context, and execution methodologies remain source-owner follow-on work.
